Registry / Terms / electronic component

electronic component

—Not in VIM/VIML G 18 #00600 · 27 instances

Suggested actions

  1. HIGH No authoritative definition in VIM or VIML.
  2. MEDIUM 18 distinct definitions — harmonise.
